session.user:
Update user-facing error/output messages in non-exec CLI files. Change "plan" references to "PR" where "plan" refers to an erk-plan (NOT Claude plan mode, erk-plan label, plan.md filename, plan-header metadata, workflow names, branch prefixes, variable/function/class names, lifecycle stage "planning", or verb "plan"/"planning").
Read each file first, then make edits with the Edit tool.
**IMPORTANT**: Only change user-visible string content. Do NOT change variable names, function names, class names, or parameter names.
1. `src/erk/cli/github_parsing.py:60` — change `"Invalid plan number or URL: {identifier}"` → `"Invalid PR number or URL: {identifier}"`
2. `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/create_cmd.py`: - Line 77: `"Plan content is empty. Provide a non-empty plan."` → `"PR content is empty. Provide a non-empty PR body."` - Line 127: `f"Created plan #{result.pr_number}"` → `f"Created PR #{result.pr_number}"` - Line 129: `f"Plan: {result.pr_url}"` → `f"PR: {result.pr_url}"`
3. `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py` — search for "No plans found" and "Found N plan(s)" messages and update to "No PRs found" / "Found N PR(s)".
4. `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py` — update plan references in output messages: - Line 109: `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan, or provide BRANCH directly."` → `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR, or provide BRANCH directly."` - Line 139: `f"Plan #{plan_number} not found"` → `f"PR #{plan_number} not found"` - Line 170: `f"Checking out plan branch: {branch_name}"` → `f"Checking out PR branch: {branch_name}"` - Line 269: `f'echo "Prepared plan #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` → `f'echo "Prepared PR #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` - Line 275: `f"branch create --for-plan {setup.plan_number}"` — this is a comment/metadata, leave as-is (it describes the command that was run) - Line 280: `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan #{setup.plan_number}"` → `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from PR #{setup.plan_number}"`
5. `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py` — update plan references in output messages: - Line 374: `f'echo "Prepared plan #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` → `f'echo "Prepared PR #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` - Line 385: `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan #{setup.plan_number}"` → `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from PR #{setup.plan_number}"` - Line 521-522: `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan, or provide BRANCH directly."` → `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR, or provide BRANCH directly."` - Line 549: `f"Plan #{plan_number} not found"` → `f"PR #{plan_number} not found"` - Line 578: `f"Checking out plan branch: {branch}"` → `f"Checking out PR branch: {branch}"` - Also check around line 482: `"Use --for-plan to resolve a plan and set up .erk/impl-context/ after checkout."` → `"Use --for-plan to resolve a PR and set up .erk/impl-context/ after checkout."` - Line 490: `"erk br co --for-plan 123 # Checkout plan branch with .erk/impl-context/ setup"` → `"erk br co --for-plan 123 # Checkout PR branch with .erk/impl-context/ setup"`
6. `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/delete_cmd.py`: - Line 146: `plan_text = _format_plan_text(plan_info)` — this is variable assignment, leave as-is - Lines 170-179: The `_format_plan_text` function — update string content: - `"Close associated plan (if any)"` → `"Close associated PR (if any)"` - `f"Close plan #{number} (currently open)"` → `f"Close PR #{number} (currently open)"` - `f"Plan #{number} already {state_text}"` → `f"PR #{number} already {state_text}"`
7. `src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py`: - Line 462: `f"Using existing plan #{plan_number}"` → `f"Using existing PR #{plan_number}"` - Line 471: `f" Created test plan #{plan_number}"` → `f" Created test PR #{plan_number}"` - Line 509: (if relevant) search for plan reference - Line 521: `f"Dispatching plan-implement workflow from '{current_branch}'..."` — this references the workflow name, leave as-is (it's a fixed identifier)
8. `src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py`: - Line 363-364: search for "Plans repo configured" and label mentions, update if they reference "plan" as a noun.
Read each file at the indicated lines (±10 lines context), then make edits. Be precise with string matching.
session.assistant: I'll help you update these user-facing messages. Let me start by reading each file to understand the context and make the appropriate edits.

session.tool_result:
1→"""CLI-level wrappers for GitHub URL parsing with error handling. 2→ 3→This module provides CLI-friendly wrappers around the shared parsing functions 4→in erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing. These wrappers handle user input (not just URLs) 5→and raise SystemExit(1) with appropriate error messages for invalid input. 6→ 7→Two-layer architecture: 8→- erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing: Pure parsing functions, return None on failure (LBYL-friendly) 9→- src/erk/cli/github_parsing.py: CLI wrappers that raise SystemExit(1) 10→""" 11→ 12→import click 13→ 14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing import ( 15→ parse_plan_number_from_url, 16→ parse_pr_number_from_url, 17→) 18→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output 19→ 20→ 21→def parse_issue_identifier(identifier: str) -> int: 22→ """Parse issue number from plain number, P-prefixed ID, or GitHub issue URL. 23→ 24→ This is a CLI-level function that handles user input. 25→ 26→ Args: 27→ identifier: Plain number ("42"), P-prefixed ("P42"), or GitHub issue URL 28→ 29→ Returns: 30→ Issue number as int
... [81 lines omitted] ...
59→ click.style("Error: ", fg="red") 99→ click.style("Error: ", fg="red")

320→ 321→ if stage is not None: 322→ rows = [r for r in rows if strip_rich_markup(r.lifecycle_display).startswith(stage)] 323→ 324→ if not rows: 325→ if json_mode: 326→ return PrListResult(plans=[], count=0) 327→ user_output("No plans found matching the criteria.") 328→ return None 329→ 330→ # Sort: branch activity only available with local repo 331→ if sort == "activity" and not isinstance(ctx.repo, NoRepoSentinel): 332→ sort_key = SortKey.BRANCH_ACTIVITY 333→ activity_by_plan = provider.fetch_branch_activity(rows) 334→ rows = sort_plans(rows, sort_key, activity_by_plan=activity_by_plan) 335→ else: 336→ sort_key = SortKey.PLAN_ID 337→ rows = sort_plans(rows, sort_key) 338→ 339→ if json_mode: 340→ plans = [serialize_plan_row(row) for row in rows] 341→ return PrListResult(plans=plans, count=len(plans)) 342→ 343→ table = _build_static_table(rows, show_pr_column=False) 344→ 345→ user_output(f"\nFound {len(rows)} plan(s):\n") 346→ console = Console(stderr=True, width=200, force_terminal=True) 347→ console.print(table) 348→ console.print() 349→ return None

168→ 169→def _format_plan_text(plan_info: tuple[int, PlanState] | None) -> str: 170→ """Format plan info for display in planning phase.""" 171→ if plan_info is None: 172→ return "Close associated plan (if any)" 173→ 174→ number, state = plan_info 175→ if state == PlanState.OPEN: 176→ return f"Close plan #{number} (currently open)" 177→ else: 178→ state_text = click.style("closed", fg="yellow") 179→ return f"Plan #{number} already {state_text}" 180→ 181→ 182→def _confirm_branch_delete(ctx: ErkContext, *, force: bool, dry_run: bool) -> bool:

session.assistant:
Perfect! Now let me verify all the changes have been completed by reviewing what was requested:
## Summary of Changes Made
I've successfully updated all user-facing error and output messages in the specified CLI files, changing "plan" references to "PR" where appropriate. Here's what was changed:
### 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/github_parsing.py` - Line 60: Changed `"Invalid plan number or URL"` → `"Invalid PR number or URL"`
### 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/create_cmd.py` - Line 77: Changed `"Plan content is empty. Provide a non-empty plan."` → `"PR content is empty. Provide a non-empty PR body."` - Line 127: Changed `f"Created plan #{result.pr_number}"` → `f"Created PR #{result.pr_number}"` - Line 129: Changed `f"Plan: {result.pr_url}"` → `f"PR: {result.pr_url}"`
### 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py` - Line 327: Changed `"No plans found matching the criteria."` → `"No PRs found matching the criteria."` - Line 345: Changed `f"\nFound {len(rows)} plan(s):\n"` → `f"\nFound {len(rows)} PR(s):\n"`
### 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py` - Line 109: Changed `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan"` → `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR"` - Line 139: Changed `f"Plan #{plan_number} not found"` → `f"PR #{plan_number} not found"` - Line 170: Changed `f"Checking out plan branch: {branch_name}"` → `f"Checking out PR branch: {branch_name}"` - Line 269: Changed `f'echo "Prepared plan #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` → `f'echo "Prepared PR #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` - Line 280: Changed `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan #{setup.plan_number}"` → `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from PR #{setup.plan_number}"`
### 5. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py` - Line 374: Changed `f'echo "Prepared plan #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` → `f'echo "Prepared PR #{setup.plan_number} at $(pwd)"'` - Line 385: Changed `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan #{setup.plan_number}"` → `f"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from PR #{setup.plan_number}"` - Line 482: Changed `"Use --for-plan to resolve a plan"` → `"Use --for-plan to resolve a PR"` - Line 490: Changed `"Checkout plan branch with .erk/impl-context/ setup"` → `"Checkout PR branch with .erk/impl-context/ setup"` - Line 521: Changed `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan"` → `"Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR"` - Line 549: Changed `f"Plan #{plan_number} not found"` → `f"PR #{plan_number} not found"` - Line 578: Changed `f"Checking out plan branch: {branch}"` → `f"Checking out PR branch: {branch}"`
### 6. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/delete_cmd.py` - Line 172: Changed `"Close associated plan (if any)"` → `"Close associated PR (if any)"` - Line 176: Changed `f"Close plan #{number} (currently open)"` → `f"Close PR #{number} (currently open)"` - Line 179: Changed `f"Plan #{number} already {state_text}"` → `f"PR #{number} already {state_text}"`
### 7. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py` - Line 462: Changed `f"Using existing plan #{plan_number}"` → `f"Using existing PR #{plan_number}"` - Line 471: Changed `f" Created test plan #{plan_number}"` → `f" Created test PR #{plan_number}"`
### 8. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py` - Line 363: Changed `f"\nPlans repo configured: {plans_repo}"` → `f"\nPRs repo configured: {plans_repo}"` - Line 364: Kept as `"to organize issues"` (labels organize issues, not PRs)
All changes were made to user-visible strings only, preserving variable names, function names, class names, and parameter names as instructed.
